List all tasks

Source: R/rrq_task.R
rrq_task_list.Rd

List all tasks. This may be a lot of tasks, and so can be quite slow to execute.

Usage

rrq_task_list(controller = NULL)

Arguments

controller

The controller to use. If not given (or NULL) we'll use the controller registered with rrq_default_controller_set().

Value

A character vector

Examples


obj <- rrq_controller("rrq:example")

rrq_task_list(controller = obj)
#>  [1] "4ea12a9bd0603b5a4d90b5b90aab0905" "d736735943d8564157f8b497345366f6"
#>  [3] "4e25d1fffe864bef4b9d8d48dcdee464" "4848ef57cfc56215e70e83f070445ed6"
#>  [5] "e6facfd31778a1949ae09d1c6f6c182e" "088c840628925b484c348b4535d27f6e"
#>  [7] "392236953631b46cba8307d3e69f65ab" "81eeb508a8b5796aba14d8c243197e3e"
#>  [9] "29a850310817a25d59869f10d45a8140" "1fb9a009df856ddc096533cc1cec2bdb"
#> [11] "bf9f7d266d29ccabff43bd25e7477da9" "c546e975d3c6bf11a0f1fc9077d03c35"
#> [13] "d31fe3dd6dac2ab8460cace23b0af900" "2866c593fd7be5df5a0a07086531e0d1"
#> [15] "2304fb43ee801044f402fd5a3e61ed93" "2eb5dd52d1fbce0c474b2ef9654c33df"
#> [17] "eeaa3235f5963a05fd9dd59905c1323e" "ac0cbf599cef0d3c12d44665d0c61841"
#> [19] "a6d0653f27ed83dd97e37872a8785fdc" "6863e7169a4d2eb679baec687225236e"
#> [21] "ab84fb73adbe9234aabe7f8f3225985d" "e15e85eaa87781fc3c1f59fe08e14d59"
#> [23] "42c84733715130430ebed422d1049e54" "1818e0c0539ee9af7a65fe8f24e3a915"
#> [25] "659db40782df93159bc329b8844dc745" "b80fa05bfae588efe2a5a80209452594"
#> [27] "02dbafe3b6010790e62791b6ca6480f4" "2868a8637037662d3be16c4002c79167"
#> [29] "f1c61c09460cd9cfad93c576f01a2a90" "c807df513ff646e4a2492c433d997584"
#> [31] "eb1fe9b9ac4af67eace2b45b4a01dd06" "b98831c5ac07009bd65de13d89b4f798"
#> [33] "d4ab4abbe6c6d98c983cd7cc16dd0b62" "6e684344843eeb49bb119ca2246ab191"
#> [35] "17416bc606ddf269d6a5e4ea10742d06" "43e80b3f02e037859d21f9f4d7e9209e"
#> [37] "e472b67ff65256914e2c9e80cb5ef7fe" "a1758b6b1f9de056f263dfe83d304ed2"
#> [39] "dff61ae9c5922aa3fac73f826eb3fcf7" "1885dda6aabae139d5220327d3881808"
#> [41] "1769898dbc0349d96a9dc7e7894eb9e3" "b60edcae9239c1bf9f37933ccf2ffc83"
#> [43] "e757c5cbb466239870c3426adeaf9316" "d018538db6e25c436182f022292edba3"
